name: softmax_read_exp028
hypothesis: THE FIX for the linear-read ceiling (exp027 PROVEN: 27 configs all recall 0.0; linear read can only emit a linear projection -> fits format marginal, cannot do exact key->value retrieval). REPLACE the within-window retrieval (old_q+prev_q, both LINEAR in q) with a SOFTMAX content-addressable read over the P most-recent writes (nonlinear in q -> CAN select the matching key's value). Math change, parity OK. Direct comparison to exp027 (same config P=64 seq_len=64 no compaction, linear read, recall 0.0). If recall>0 -> linear ceiling BROKEN (first nonzero recall in 28 experiments). Keeps kron_q (long-term, linear) + self-term (stability) intact; replaces the retrieval path itself (not add like exp017, not wrong term like exp026).
